description:
**Milestone:** Projects and Settings Sync

Create Automerge document for projects (Record<slug, Project>). ProjectService reads/writes via CRDTStore. Project ceremonies sync as project sub-documents. PRD and milestone content stored as Automerge text fields.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/project-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/crdt-sync-service.ts
- libs/crdt/src/documents.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Projects document syncs across instances
- [ ] Project created on instance A visible on instance B
- [ ] Project updates (status, milestones) propagate in real-time
- [ ] Backward compatible: works without CRDT (falls back to filesystem)

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
